architecture.summary: No architectural changes. Reuses existing enableAgentTeamsEnvVar with os.homedir() as additional call site.

integrations.summary: Writes to ~/.claude/settings.json env section — canonical Claude Code mechanism. No new integrations.

ui-ux.summary: No UI changes. CLI output unchanged.

performance.summary: Negligible — one additional JSON read/write. Idempotent, skips write if already set.

security.summary: No security implications. Writing to user-owned ~/.claude/settings.json. No secrets.

edge-cases.summary: Function handles: missing dir, missing file, malformed JSON, already set. os.homedir() works on all platforms.
